title: rsa: raw_function calls wolfhsm_rsa_sign with no name-mismatch comment
description: In src/crypto/rsa.rs, the Rust method is named raw_function but it calls the C function wolfhsm_rsa_sign with no comment explaining the discrepancy. A contributor adding a new raw operation, or reading an error message that says 'wolfhsm_rsa_sign', will have no idea the underlying C symbol has this name. Add a comment on the unsafe block or the method explaining that wolfhsm_rsa_sign is wolfHSM's generic RSA primitive dispatcher — the C function name predates any Rust naming.
